testcase.name: test_analytics_overview_loads

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing expected field: total_users assert ('total_users' in {'accounts': {'total': 75}, 'cards': {'pending': 8}, 'kyc': {'approved': 72, 'pending': 1}, 'tickets': {'open': 74, 'total': 75}, ...} or 'totalusers' in "{'users': {'total': 93, 'active': 74}, 'kyc': {'pending': 1, 'approved': 72}, 'accounts': {'total': 75}, 'transfers': {'total': 131, 'pending': 38, 'completed': 5, 'rejected': 88, 'volume_cents': 3673124638}, 'tickets': {'total': 75, 'open': 74}, 'cards': {'pending': 8}}") + where 'totalusers' = <built-in method replace of str object at 0xfc258529c770>('_', '') + where <built-in method replace of str object at 0xfc258529c770> = 'total_users'.replace + and "{'users': {'total': 93, 'active': 74}, 'kyc': {'pending': 1, 'approved': 72}, 'accounts': {'total': 75}, 'transfers': {'total': 131, 'pending': 38, 'completed': 5, 'rejected': 88, 'volume_cents': 3673124638}, 'tickets': {'total': 75, 'open': 74}, 'cards': {'pending': 8}}" = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfc2585198030>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfc2585198030> = "{'users': {'total': 93, 'active': 74}, 'kyc': {'pending': 1, 'approved': 72}, 'accounts': {'total': 75}, 'transfers': {'total': 131, 'pending': 38, 'completed': 5, 'rejected': 88, 'volume_cents': 3673124638}, 'tickets': {'total': 75, 'open': 74}, 'cards': {'pending': 8}}".lower + where "{'users': {'total': 93, 'active': 74}, 'kyc': {'pending': 1, 'approved': 72}, 'accounts': {'total': 75}, 'transfers': {'total': 131, 'pending': 38, 'completed': 5, 'rejected': 88, 'volume_cents': 3673124638}, 'tickets': {'total': 75, 'open': 74}, 'cards': {'pending': 8}}" = str({'accounts': {'total': 75}, 'cards': {'pending': 8}, 'kyc': {'approved': 72, 'pending': 1}, 'tickets': {'open': 74, 'total': 75}, ...})

testcase.failure: tests/test_final_redeploy.py:111: in test_analytics_overview_loads assert field in data or field.replace("_", "") in str(data).lower(), f"Missing expected field: {field}" E AssertionError: Missing expected field: total_users E assert ('total_users' in {'accounts': {'total': 75}, 'cards': {'pending': 8}, 'kyc': {'approved': 72, 'pending': 1}, 'tickets': {'open': 74, 'total': 75}, ...} or 'totalusers' in "{'users': {'total': 93, 'active': 74}, 'kyc': {'pending': 1, 'approved': 72}, 'accounts': {'total': 75}, 'transfers': {'total': 131, 'pending': 38, 'completed': 5, 'rejected': 88, 'volume_cents': 3673124638}, 'tickets': {'total': 75, 'open': 74}, 'cards': {'pending': 8}}") E + where 'totalusers' = <built-in method replace of str object at 0xfc258529c770>('_', '') E + where <built-in method replace of str object at 0xfc258529c770> = 'total_users'.replace E + and "{'users': {'total': 93, 'active': 74}, 'kyc': {'pending': 1, 'approved': 72}, 'accounts': {'total': 75}, 'transfers': {'total': 131, 'pending': 38, 'completed': 5, 'rejected': 88, 'volume_cents': 3673124638}, 'tickets': {'total': 75, 'open': 74}, 'cards': {'pending': 8}}" = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfc2585198030>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfc2585198030> = "{'users': {'total': 93, 'active': 74}, 'kyc': {'pending': 1, 'approved': 72}, 'accounts': {'total': 75}, 'transfers': {'total': 131, 'pending': 38, 'completed': 5, 'rejected': 88, 'volume_cents': 3673124638}, 'tickets': {'total': 75, 'open': 74}, 'cards': {'pending': 8}}".lower E + where "{'users': {'total': 93, 'active': 74}, 'kyc': {'pending': 1, 'approved': 72}, 'accounts': {'total': 75}, 'transfers': {'total': 131, 'pending': 38, 'completed': 5, 'rejected': 88, 'volume_cents': 3673124638}, 'tickets': {'total': 75, 'open': 74}, 'cards': {'pending': 8}}" = str({'accounts': {'total': 75}, 'cards': {'pending': 8}, 'kyc': {'approved': 72, 'pending': 1}, 'tickets': {'open': 74, 'total': 75}, ...})

testcase.name: test_kyc_queue_loads
testcase.failure: tests/test_final_redeploy.py:175: in test_kyc_queue_loads assert response.status_code == 200, f"KYC queue failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: KYC queue failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_kyc_filter_by_status
testcase.failure: tests/test_final_redeploy.py:189: in test_kyc_filter_by_status assert response.status_code == 200, f"KYC filter by {status} failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: KYC filter by SUBMITTED failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_admin_endpoints_blocked_for_non_admin

failure.message: AssertionError: Endpoint /api/v1/admin/kyc should be blocked, got 404 assert 404 in [401, 403, 422] + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_final_redeploy.py:508: in test_admin_endpoints_blocked_for_non_admin assert response.status_code in [401, 403, 422], \ E AssertionError: Endpoint /api/v1/admin/kyc should be blocked, got 404 E assert 404 in [401, 403, 422] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
